summary: Pre-existing finding about zero campaign test coverage is stale — truth-closure.test.ts has 1182 lines and 17 GROUP test blocks
detail: Finding from ses_182cfc18 claimed "Campaign layer (16 files, ~4000+ lines) has zero test coverage — no test directory, no imports from @/campaign in any test file". However truth-closure.test.ts (1182 lines, 17 GROUP blocks) exists at packages/opencode/src/campaign/truth-closure.test.ts and extensively tests the campaign module. The finding appears to be outdated.
